columns.name: KornHandler
columns.description: The handler of grain, if any

columns.name: Aar
columns.description: Year associated with the contract or agreement

columns.name: AvdNr
columns.description: Division number related to the contract or agreement

columns.name: Kommunenr
columns.description: The commune number involved in the special contract

columns.name: FraDato
columns.description: Start date of the contract or agreement period

columns.name: TilDato
columns.description: End date of the contract or agreement period

columns.name: Avregningstype
columns.description: Type of billing or settlement method used in the contract

columns.name: Art
columns.description: Type of the product or service covered by the contract

columns.name: Sort
columns.description: Sorting code for categorization within the contract

columns.name: Slag
columns.description: Category of the product or service in the contract

columns.name: OkoLogisk
columns.description: Indicates if the product is organic (J), conventional (N), or both (B)

columns.name: Bruksomraade
columns.description: The area of usage, either for food (F), fodder (M), or both (B)

columns.name: Avtale_Type
columns.description: Type of agreement related to the special contract

columns.name: Brukerid
columns.description: User identifier associated with the contract or agreement

columns.name: Tidspunkt
columns.description: Timestamp of when the record was created or last updated
